strengthening_paths.suggestion: In Stage 0, isolate a named finite-grid compatibility lemma proving that the q_a(c|x) constraints are exactly equivalent to matching the full conditional factual law P(A,Y|X=x).
Before proving the open-set version of Conjecture 2, give a fully numeric two-action, three-reward witness with explicit budgets and strict inequalities for the U versus U_rect gap.

Add Bertsimas-Imai-Li distributionally robust causal inference as an extra related-work comparator for distributional sensitivity models, while keeping Zhang-Xu-Tan as the closest simultaneous-constraint comparator.

recommended_next_step: Advance to Stage 0 derivation, prioritizing the full-cell compatibility lemma and a concrete non-rectangular witness.
